channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government outlines short-term fuel levy relief and long-term energy strategy
item.description: South Africa faces uncertainty due to the ongoing Middle East conflict, which could impact global trade and energy markets. The government’s recent intervention, cutting the fuel levy by R3 per litre ...

item.title: Oga Obinna gives practical money-making tips to Mbavu the Destroyer after boxing loss to Majembe
item.description: Media personality Oga Obinna has given useful advice to boxer Mbavu the Destroyer on how to turn his recent fame into cash following his technical knockout defeat by Majembe on April 4 at Kasarani Ind...

item.title: ASX slips amid Middle East tensions and corporate profit downgrades
item.description: The Australian share market opened lower on Monday as geopolitical tensions escalated following the collapse of peace talks between the US and Iran. US President Donald Trump ordered a naval blockade ...

item.title: Manchester City Secure Convincing 3-0 Victory Over Chelsea as They Mount Another Late-Season Premier League Challenge
item.description: Manchester City delivered a strong performance with a 3-0 victory against Chelsea in the Premier League, following recent successes in cup competitions including a League Cup final win over Arsenal an...

item.title: Senate PROTECT Committee Holds Hearing on Government Measures for Oil Crisis and Fuel Price Rollback
item.description: The Senate ad hoc PROTECT Committee, chaired by Senator Win Gatchalian, convened on April 13, 2026, to discuss the latest government interventions addressing the ongoing oil crisis triggered by the co...

item.title: Police Clash with Opposition Leaders and Journalists During Rigathi Gachagua Rally in Kikuyu
item.description: Chaos erupted during a political rally in Kikuyu Constituency led by opposition figure and former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua, leaving several journalists and supporters injured. The opposition ...

item.title: UK ministers propose using secondary legislation to align with evolving EU single market rules in specific sectors
item.description: The UK government is preparing new legislation as part of its EU reset strategy that would allow ministers to dynamically align with European Union single market rules in agreed areas without requirin...

item.title: Bihar prepares for transition as Nitish Kumar to resign after April 14 cabinet meet
item.description: Bihar is entering a critical political transition as Chief Minister Nitish Kumar is expected to resign following his final cabinet meeting on April 14, 2026. The outgoing CM has called the meeting at ...

item.title: Arkansas Woman Faces Legal Trouble After Payroll Overpayment of KSh 2.5 Million
item.description: A 50-year-old woman in Arkansas, Rene Nichole Coleman, is in serious legal trouble after a payroll mistake saw her receive KSh 2.5 million more than her normal pay. Coleman, who normally earns KSh 2,1...

item.title: UK refuses to participate in US-led blockade of Iranian ports amid Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: The United Kingdom has confirmed it will not participate in enforcing the United States' military blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz. While British naval forces will continue to operate...

item.title: Woman caught hiding China visa in suspected trafficking case at Davao airport
item.description: A 25-year-old woman from Sultan Kudarat was intercepted by immigration officers at the Davao International Airport after she allegedly tried to conceal a Chinese visa by gluing the pages of her passpo...

item.title: US Treasury and Federal Reserve Encourage Banks to Explore Anthropic’s Mythos AI Model
item.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell held a meeting with major bank executives this week, where they encouraged the use of Anthropic’s newly launched Mythos AI...

item.title: Jess Potter recounts frightening incident as her baby chokes on lost earring
item.description: Jess Potter, known from the UK reality show Married At First Sight, shared a harrowing experience involving her eight-month-old daughter, Mia, who nearly died after choking on a lost earring. Potter d...

item.title: Karnataka Congress Leaders Face Disciplinary Action Over Internal Conflict in Davanagere South Bypoll
item.description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah has announced that action is being taken against certain Congress leaders after allegations emerged of an internal conspiracy aimed at defeating the party’s candi...

item.title: Colorado meatpacking workers end strike after securing improved pay and health protections
item.description: Thousands of employees at the Swift Beef Co. meatpacking plant in Greeley, Colorado, have reached a settlement with JBS USA after staging a three-week strike demanding higher wages and better health c...

item.title: Rory McIlroy claims consecutive US Masters victories
item.description: Rory McIlroy has triumphed at the US Masters, securing the prestigious title for the second year in a row. His performance throughout the tournament was characterised by remarkable consistency and str...

item.title: MK Stalin Confident of DMK-Led Alliance Victory in Tamil Nadu Assembly Polls
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin has expressed strong confidence that the DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance (SPA) will win the April 23 Assembly elections and form the government for a second co...

item.title: ADC updates convention committee ahead of April 14 national meeting
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don drop new list of committee members wey go arrange their upcoming national convention wey go happen on April 14, 2026. This announcement come on Sunday through...

item.title: Adult male seriously injured in fire at Toronto's Seaton House shelter
item.description: A fire broke out at Seaton House, one of Toronto’s largest homeless shelters, resulting in serious injuries to a man in his 40s. Emergency services responded promptly, transporting the injured man to ...

item.title: DA Elects Geordin Hill-Lewis as Federal Leader, Faces Transformation and Growth Challenges
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) held its 2026 Federal Congress in Midrand, attracting around 2,400 delegates and marking a key leadership transition. Geordin Hill-Lewis was elected as Federal Leader, tak...
